A

addCircuitsInList() - Method in class UserInterfaceLayer.CircuitExplorer
Adds all circuits from the project to the list model.
addComponent(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Adds a component to the canvas and circuit.
addComponent(Component) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Adds a component to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
addConnector(Connector) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Adds a connector to the canvas and circuit.
addConnector(Connector) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Adds a connector (wire) to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
addToolSelectionListener(ActionListener) - Method in class UserInterfaceLayer.Palette
Adds a single ActionListener to all buttons in the palette.
addWire(Connector) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Pin
Adds a connector (wire) to this pin.
AND - Class in BusinessLayer
AND gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
AND(int, int) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.AND
Constructs an AND gate at the given position.
Application - package Application
